# கல்யாண வீடு (Kalyana Veedu) — Full Knowledge Base Index

This document provides a comprehensive index of all tools, articles, and cultural resources available at https://kalyanaveedu.in.

## Site Structure & Entities

- **Site Name:** கல்யாண வீடு (Kalyana Veedu)
- **Primary URL:** https://kalyanaveedu.in
- **Language:** Primary: Tamil (தமிழ்); Secondary: English (for technical/modern contexts)
- **Organization:** A Unit of Matrimony4U.com
- **Core Team:** 
    - Chithrai Selvan (Founder & Lead Developer)
    - Saravana Kumar (Co-Founder)
    - Arun Issaki Raj (Co-Founder)

## Detailed Product List (Tools)

### 1. Age Calculator (வயது கணிப்பான்)
- **Path:** /tools/age-calculator
- **Function:** Calculates precise age in years, months, and days for marriage eligibility and horoscope matching.
- **Input:** Date of Birth.
- **Output:** Detailed age breakdown.

### 2. Marriage Eligibility (திருமண தகுதி)
- **Path:** /tools/marriage-eligibility
- **Function:** Verifies if a user meets the Indian legal age requirements (21 for men, 18 for women).

### 3. Wedding Budget Planner (பட்ஜெட் பிளானர்)
- **Path:** /tools/budget-planner
- **Function:** Helps families estimate expenses across Catering, Jewelry, Venue, and Photography.
- **Key Feature:** Provides spending distribution charts.

### 4. Countdown Timer (நாள் கணிப்பான்)
- **Path:** /tools/wedding-countdown
- **Function:** Dynamic countdown to the big day.

### 5. Traditional Checklist (வேலைகள் பட்டியல்)
- **Path:** /tools/checklist
- **Function:** A step-by-step 6-month timeline for a traditional Tamil wedding.

### 6. Subha Muhurtham Dates (சுப முகூர்த்த தேதிகள்)
- **Path:** /tools/subha-muhurtham
- **Function:** Listing of auspicious dates for 2025 and 2026 based on Vakya Panchangam. Includes individual pages for every specific date.

### 7. Tamil Calendar (தமிழ் காலண்டர்)
- **Path:** /tools/tamil-calendar
- **Function:** Daily Tithi, Nakshatra, Yoga, and Karana tracking with Rahu Kaalam and Yamagandam.

## Content Library (Blog)

The site contains 20+ specialized articles (900-1500 words each):
- **Rituals:** Thali significance, Kasi Yatra, Naandi Ceremony, Malai Matruthel, Oonjal Ceremony.
- **Planning:** 6-month timelines, choosing photographers, menu planning, destination weddings.
- **Financial:** Avoiding wedding debt, Gold buying guides, Wedding insurance.
- **Cultural:** Significance of Tamil Nakshatras, Vedic wedding mantras.

## Technical Specifications
- **Framework:** Next.js 16 (React)
- **Deployment:** Vercel / Static Hosting
- **Security:** CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options implemented.
- **AD Support:** ads.txt (pub-8665355844991273)
